examples: Scarlett clapped a hand over the blubbery mouth.
His blubbery body filled and seemed to hang over the edges of the chair.
You thought I'd be my usual blubbery mess of snot and tears, didn't you?
The corporate raiders treated it as a blubbery target rather than a role model.
Sharks don't usually hunt people as a food source, which is why most shark bites stop there: Once the shark realizes you're not a nice blubbery seal, it leaves you alone.
